item.title: Patient Perspectives of Intestinal Ultrasound in IBD: A Quantitative Evaluation of Satisfaction and Diagnostic Preference.
item.description: Digestive diseases and sciences - Intestinal ultrasound (IUS) has been shown to be an accurate, non-invasive, point-of-care tool for monitoring disease activity in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). While its diagnostic performance ...

item.title: Development and validation of the SYSU-score for MRI-based transmural healing assessment in Crohn's disease: a dual-center study.
item.description: European radiology - Standardizing magnetic resonance enterography (MRE)-defined transmural healing (TH) remains challenging in Crohn's disease (CD) despite its prognostic superiority. We aimed to evaluate seven conven...
